name: Rule The World CHESS
short_description: Rule the world with your army! Defeat Demons kingdom as well as Humans Kingdom! Use your magic and weapons to conquer the world! Experience chess in 3D fights with a lot of customizations! Create your own army!
detailed_description:
In the medieval times there used to be battles, kingdoms used to fight to conquer each other, and on that concept a game was created named "Chess".
Experience those fights in the Real world as well as Demon world graphics.
The game is not limited to human characters but also has a variety of Demonic characters and a lot of customizations for every character!

KEY FEATURES

COMBAT VIEW
You can turn on and turn off combat view in the game.
If the combat view is on, then the attacking camera will zoom in to show the fight.
If the combat view is off, then the game is all time top down.


RPG MODE
You can turn on and turn off RPG Mode in the game.
If the RPG Mode is on, then you get a menu to select the attack from the available attacks.
If the RPG Mode is off, then the attack is selected randomly.


2D CHESSBOARD
You can see complete game status on that 2D Chess Board also you can draw lines on it to make your strategy.

GAME MODES


OFFLINE : Play with computer AI.
  • Player Vs Computer
  • Computer Vs Player
  • Player Vs Player

ONLINE : Play with your family, friends or anyone in the world.

GAME FEATURES


3D Maps
8 different 3D maps, more options will come in future.
  • Asian Kingdom
  • Castle
  • Dungeon
  • Aztec Temple
  • Eternal Temple
  • Ruins
  • Grim Temple
  • Graveyard

3D Characters
82 different 3D characters, more options will come in future.
  • 14 Kings
  • 14 Queens
  • 13 Bishops
  • 15 Knights
  • 13 Rooks
  • 13 Pawns
Each character can be customized individually.

Character Customizations Includes
  • Armor Colors
  • Skin Colors
  • Hair Colors
  • Hair Styles
  • Weapon Customizations
  • Weapon Effects and more
For more details, please check videos.

Chess Board Customizations
80 different chess board color options which can make a total of 6400 combinations, more options will come in future.

Move Effect Customizations
7 different types of move effects and every effect has its own levels.
For more details, please check videos.

3D Chess Pieces
Play with 3D Chess Pieces too.
Colors can also be customized.

Reference Chess Pieces
In game you will have reference pieces above the board which will help in identifying the 3D Chess Characters and Pieces easily.
If you want, you can turn off the feature from settings.
Colors can also be customized.

Magical Experience
Many characters have magic effects, enjoy the effects in battle!

Cinematic Experience
Every map has its own cinematic experience!

Hide Chess Characters & Pieces
In the middle of the game, you can even hide chess characters or pieces!

Multiple Languages
Game supports 16 Languages other than English!
For Audio's only English.
Those 16 languages are converted via online translator so there is possibility of inappropriate translations.
Join our discord server and help us correct the translations and get shout out in the server and other gifts

Share Your Suggestions

Share your ideas to improve the game with us. We are great listeners!
  • Discord

Report Bug

Report bugs to get them fixed as soon as possible.
  • Discord

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
